articles.title: Marketing operating system Nectar Social raises $30M Series A led by Menlo
articles.description: AI-powered marketing platform Nectar Social announced Thursday that it raised a $30 million Series A round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, which was created alongside Anthropic.

articles.title: Strategy to repurchase $1.5B of 2029 convertible notes
articles.description: The notes carry a 0% coupon, but can be converted into equity in the company if holders choose to redeem their notes for shares.

articles.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
articles.description: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

articles.title: Bitcoin analysis sees 'bear trap' as BTC price passes two-week lows under $78K
articles.description: Bitcoin fell below $78,000 for the first time since the start of May, but traders refused to give up hope of a BTC price rebound coming next.

articles.title: 大型恆星級黑洞究竟如何產生？或為緻密星團黑洞碰撞產物
articles.description: 天文學家普遍認為一定質量以上的大質量恆星歷經超新星爆炸，最終會塌縮成恆星級黑洞，但某些恆星級黑洞質量卻有點太大 […]

articles.title: AI 分析游離 DNA，提早揪出無症狀肝病
articles.description: 約翰霍普金斯大學 Kimmel Cancer Center 的研究團隊開發出一種結合人工智慧的血液檢測，可透過 […]

articles.title: The offline desk gadget that actually got me to sit up straight
articles.description: Deep Care's $350 device is pricy, but it runs offline and helps you improve your posture and movement habits

articles.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
articles.description: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

articles.title: Jump Crypto’s ‘Firedancer’ is taking a slow and steady approach to its long-awaited Solana infrastructure rollout
articles.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, the lead engineer at Firedancer gives an update on how the new client, also known as a software, is fairing in the Solana ecosystem.

articles.title: $60B AI chip darling Cerebras almost died early on, burning $8M a month
articles.description: Cerebras Systems was 2026's biggest tech IPO so far. But years ago, it burned through hundreds of millions working on a chip many believed impossible.

articles.title: OpenAI partners with Malta to give all citizens free ChatGPT Plus access
articles.description: In a world-first deal, OpenAI and Malta will give all citizens free ChatGPT Plus for a year after they complete a government-backed AI literacy course.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Crypto users are choosing juicy yields over protection, putting billions at risk of hacks
articles.description: DeFi insurance protocols debuted with huge ambitions during the 2020 crypto boom. But as hacks evolved and users chased yields over protection, most of the sector collapsed under the same risks it was built to cover.

articles.title: Users turn to jailbreaking their older Kindles as Amazon ends support
articles.description: It may be possible to jailbreak an older, end-of-support Kindle and continue adding books to it. But doing so carries risks.

articles.title: The $293 million KelpDAO hack shows why DeFi is finally being forced to grow up
articles.description: For protocol founders and security researchers, the incident reinforced a broader shift underway across crypto: DeFi is no longer primarily battling coding bugs. It’s battling complexity.

articles.title: XRP beat bitcoin gains as CLARITY Act advanced, but a real bullrun still needs Congress
articles.description: The token jumped 5% after a Senate committee moved the market-structure bill forward, reviving hopes that legal clarity can pull deeper institutional money into XRP products.

articles.title: THORChain confirms $10M exploit, rolls out recovery portal for affected users
articles.description: THORChain has launched a recovery portal following a $10 million exploit, allowing affected users across four chains to revoke malicious approvals and claim refunds.

articles.title: Sharplink CEO points out 3 catalysts for Ethereum's price to surge higher
articles.description: The rest of the world is “really closely” watching the US CLARITY Act as the nation moves further away from the previous “hostile stance,” according to Sharplink’s chief.

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1B in a week, snapping six-week inflow run
articles.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs shed $1 billion in a single week as capital rotated toward AI stocks and macro uncertainty weighed on sentiment, ending a six-week run that had pulled in $3.4 billion.

articles.title: 微軟聽進使用者心聲，將開放工作列自由移動和開始功能表大改版
articles.description: 微軟為了挽回使用者信任，近期終於在 Windows 11 放寬了備受討論的介面限制。 從近日測試人員釋出的版本 […]
